diagrams.title: Memory Read Operation Data Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the data flow path during a memory READ operation from CPU to memory and back
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how data is retrieved from memory location to CPU register

diagrams.title: Stack Memory Operation
diagrams.description: Visualizes the PUSH and POP operations on a growing stack in memory
elements: Stack Memory (High Address to Low Address)
PUSH operation showing SP decrement then write
POP operation showing read then SP increment
diagrams.purpose: Learning how stack operations manage memory for function calls and local data

diagrams.title: Endian Byte Ordering Comparison
diagrams.description: Comparison of big-endian and little-endian byte ordering for a 32-bit word
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how multi-byte data is stored in memory on different architectures

diagrams.title: Memory Hierarchy Pyramid
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of memory types from fastest/smallest to slowest/largest
elements: Shows trade-off between speed and size
Access time labels at each level
diagrams.purpose: Understanding memory hierarchy and why caching improves performance
